Event Speakers

Time

Start: December 4, 2016 - 3:00 PM End: December 4, 2016 - 9:00 PM

Address

Newyork: December 4, 2016 - 3:00 PM London: December 6, 2016 - 9:00 PM

Event Content

  • Over 40 lectures and 60 hours of content
  • Live Project End to End Software Testing Training Included
  • Information packed practical training starting from basics to advanced testing techniques.
  • Course content designed by considering current software testing technology and the job market.
  • Best suitable for beginners to advanced level users and who learn faster when demonstrated.
  • Practical assignments at the end of every session.

Event Participants

  • Google Calendar +
  • Ical Import +
  • Join The Event

item.title: Sample Page
item.dc:creator: jilani
item.content:encoded:
[rev_slider alias="my-slider"] This is an example page. It's different from a blog post because it will stay in one place and will show up in your site navigation (in most themes). Most people start with an About page that introduces them to potential site visitors. It might say something like this:
Hi there! I'm a bike messenger by day, aspiring actor by night, and this is my website. I live in Los Angeles, have a great dog named Jack, and I like piña coladas. (And gettin' caught in the rain.)
...or something like this:
The XYZ Doohickey Company was founded in 1971, and has been providing quality doohickeys to the public ever since. Located in Gotham City, XYZ employs over 2,000 people and does all kinds of awesome things for the Gotham community.
As a new WordPress user, you should go to your dashboard to delete this page and create new pages for your content. Have fun!

dit%20vel%2C%20luctus%20pulvinar%2C%20hendrerit%20id%2C%20lorem.%20Maecenas%20nec%20odio%20et%20ante%20tincidunt%20tempus.%20Donec%20vitae%20sapien%20ut%20libero%20venenatis%20faucibus.%20Nullam%20quis%20ante.%20Etiam%20sit%20amet%20orci%20eget%20eros%20faucibus%20tincidunt.%20Duis%20leo.%22%2C%22name%22%3A%22Oscar%20Tabarez%22%2C%22position%22%3A%22Martin%2C%20Parent%22%7D%2C%7B%22clint_img%22%3A%221663%22%2C%22clint_quote%22%3A%22Sed%20fringilla%20mauris%20sit%20amet%20nibh.%20Donec%20sodales%20sagittis%20magna.%20Sed%20consequat%2C%20leo%20eget%20bibendum%20sodales%2C%20augue%20velit%20cursus%20nunc%2C%20quis%20gravida%20magna%20mi%20a%20libero.%20Fusce%20vulputate%20eleifend%20sapien.%20Vestibulum%20purus%20quam%2C%20scelerisque%20ut%2C%20mollis%20sed%2C%20nonummy%20id%2C%20metus.%22%2C%22name%22%3A%22John%20Charls%22%2C%22position%22%3A%22Martin%2C%20Parent%22%7D%2C%7B%22clint_img%22%3A%221664%22%2C%22clint_quote%22%3A%22Nullam%20accumsan%20lorem%20in%20dui.%20Cras%20ultricies%20mi%20eu%20turpis%20hendrerit%20fringilla.%20Vestibulum%20ante%20ipsum%20primis%20in%20faucibus%20orci%20luctus%20et%20ultrices%20posuere%20cubilia%20Curae%3B%20In%20ac%20dui%20quis%20mi%20consectetuer%20lacinia.%20Nam%20pretium%20turpis%20et%20arcu.%22%2C%22name%22%3A%22Shane%20Bond%22%2C%22position%22%3A%22Martin%2C%20Parent%22%7D%2C%7B%22clint_img%22%3A%221660%22%2C%22clint_quote%22%3A%22Duis%20arcu%20tortor%2C%20suscipit%20eget%2C%20imperdiet%20nec%2C%20imperdiet%20iaculis%2C%20ipsum.%20Sed%20aliquam%20ultrices%20mauris.%20Integer%20ante%20arcu%2C%20accumsan%20a%2C%20consectetuer%20eget%2C%20posuere%20ut%2C%20mauris.%20Praesent%20adipiscing.%20Phasellus%20ullamcorper%20ipsum%20rutrum%20nunc.%20Nunc%20nonummy%20metus.%22%2C%22name%22%3A%22David%20Warner%22%2C%22position%22%3A%22Martin%2C%20Parent%22%7D%2C%7B%22clint_img%22%3A%221662%22%2C%22clint_quote%22%3A%22Vestibulum%20volutpat%20pretium%20libero.%20Cras%20id%20dui.%20Aenean%20ut%20eros%20et%20nisl%20sagittis%20vestibulum.%20Nulla Event Speakers

Time

Start: December 4, 2016 - 3:00 PM End: December 4, 2016 - 9:00 PM

Address

Newyork: December 4, 2016 - 3:00 PM London: December 6, 2016 - 9:00 PM

Event Content

  • Over 40 lectures and 60 hours of content
  • Live Project End to End Software Testing Training Included
  • Information packed practical training starting from basics to advanced testing techniques.
  • Course content designed by considering current software testing technology and the job market.
  • Best suitable for beginners to advanced level users and who learn faster when demonstrated.
  • Practical assignments at the end of every session.
